reason: The image depicts a large group of mounted warriors traversing mountainous terrain. The clothing appears to be made of natural materials like leather and fur. The weaponry includes spears and possible swords. The setting is appropriate for the period and location. However, the helmets are of a later style (closer to Roman legionaries). The leatherwork detailing and saddle style are more advanced than would be expected for the Huns of 370 AD. Furthermore, the degree of uniformity in attire is questionable given the nomadic nature of the Huns. Also, while some flags are present, the standards appear somewhat generic and don't bear specific Hunnic symbols.  The overall style and composition lend a slightly romanticized or idealized feel to the image rather than strictly historical accuracy.
